summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FORGE AI v4 features: Theme toggle (Noir ↔ Daylight), Real-time collaboration (public share + email invite), and Sandpack preview. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All new features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Share.jsx imports 'API' from '../lib/api' but uses axios directly - minor inconsistency but works correctly
SandpackPreview component handles empty state gracefully with 'Awaiting files' message

test_credentials.note: Test users cleaned up after testing

seed_data_creation: Created owner and collaborator test users via mongosh for collaboration testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: v4 features fully tested: (1) Theme toggle works - switches html[data-theme] between 'noir' and 'daylight', persists to localStorage as 'forge-theme', daylight uses cream #F4EFE5 bg with dark text. (2) Collaboration: PATCH /projects/{id} owner-only, POST /invite creates project_members, DELETE /members/{id} owner-only, GET /share/{id} public read-only (no auth), collaborators see shared projects with role='collaborator', Share button hidden for collaborators. (3) Sandpack preview mounts in Preview tab, shows idle state when no files.

backend: GET /api/share/{project_id} - public project accessible without auth ✓
Collaborator sees shared project in GET /api/projects ✓
frontend: Theme toggle switches html[data-theme] between 'noir' and 'daylight' ✓
Public toggle shows copy-link field when enabled ✓
Invite button [data-testid=invite-btn] adds member to list ✓
Member list shows with remove buttons ✓
Share page has Forge header, project info, 'shared' chip ✓
Sandpack preview shows idle state when no files ✓
Collaborator can access project with chat input ✓
Collaborator sees their own credits (50) not owner's ✓

from_previous_iterations.emergentintegrations_library_bug: get_checkout_status() fails with Pydantic validation error - checkout creation works, status polling returns 502
